item.title: Docker-udrulning
item.description: Deploy @webhouse/cms med Docker — kombineret eller opdelt arkitektur, Docker Hub, GitHub Container Registry og Fly.io.

item.title: Docker Deployment
item.description: Deploy @webhouse/cms with Docker — combined or split architecture, Docker Hub, GitHub Container Registry, and Fly.io.

item.title: Guide til build.ts — Statisk site-generering
item.description: Trin-for-trin guide til at bygge den perfekte build.ts til et statisk HTML-site drevet af @webhouse/cms.

item.title: Next.js integrationsguide
item.description: Komplet guide til at bygge en Next.js App Router-site med @webhouse/cms — fra indholdsindlæsning til deployment.

item.title: Next.js Integration Guide
item.description: Complete guide to building a Next.js App Router site with @webhouse/cms — from content reading to deployment.

item.title: Guide to build.ts — Static Site Generation
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building the perfect build.ts for a static HTML site powered by @webhouse/cms.

item.title: Delte Snippets — Genbrugelige kodeblokke
item.description: Sådan byggede vi et delt snippet-system til docs.webhouse.app med vores eget CMS — og hvordan du kan gøre det samme.

item.title: Shared Snippets — Reusable Code Blocks
item.description: How we built a shared snippets system for docs.webhouse.app using our own CMS — and how you can do the same.

item.title: Konfigurationsreference
item.description: Komplet reference for cms.config.ts — collections, felter, lagring, build og API-indstillinger.

item.title: Configuration Reference
item.description: Complete reference for cms.config.ts — collections, fields, storage, build, and API settings.

item.title: Next.js-mønstre
item.description: Sådan læser du CMS-indhold i Next.js — loader-funktioner, sider, statisk generering og metadata.

item.title: Next.js Patterns
item.description: How to read CMS content in Next.js — loader functions, pages, static generation, and metadata.

item.title: Hurtig start
item.description: Opret et nyt projekt og hav en CMS-drevet side kørende på under 5 minutter.

item.title: Quick Start
item.description: Scaffold a new project and have a CMS-powered site running in under 5 minutes.

item.title: AI content generation
item.description: Generate and translate content with AI CLI

item.title: Block renderer
item.description: Render CMS blocks in Next.js

item.title: Fly.io deployment
item.description: Dockerfile and fly.toml for Fly.io

item.title: i18n configuration
item.description: Multi-language collection config

item.title: Next.js blog listing page
item.description: Blog listing with generateStaticParams

item.title: Next.js blog post page
item.description: Dynamic post page with SEO metadata

item.title: Richtext renderer
item.description: Render CMS richtext with react-markdown

item.title: SEO metadata in Next.js
item.description: Generate SEO metadata from CMS _seo fields

item.title: Content loader functions
item.description: Read CMS content in Next.js with fs

item.title: Define a collection
item.description: Basic collection definition in cms.config.ts

item.title: Dev server and build
item.description: Start dev server and build for production

item.title: Document JSON format
item.description: Standard document structure in content/

item.title: Filesystem storage config
item.description: Configure filesystem storage adapter

item.title: GitHub storage config
item.description: Configure GitHub storage adapter

item.title: Create a new project
item.description: Scaffold a new @webhouse/cms project

item.title: Skabeloner & Boilerplates
item.description: Tre klar-til-brug boilerplates og otte eksempelsites til at komme hurtigt i gang.

item.title: Templates & Boilerplates
item.description: Three ready-to-use boilerplates and eight example sites to jump-start your project.

item.title: AI Builder Guide
item.description: 20 modulære dokumentationsmoduler der følger med npm-pakken — designet til AI-agenter der bygger sites.

item.title: AI Builder Guide
item.description: 20 modular documentation modules that ship with the npm package — designed for AI agents building sites.

item.title: Fejlfinding
item.description: Almindelige problemer og løsninger — GitHub-adapter, indhold vises ikke, portkonflikter, billeder og mere.

item.title: Indholdsrelationer
item.description: Forbind dokumenter på tværs af collections med relationsfelter — single, multi og reverse lookups.

item.title: Richtext-editor
item.description: TipTap-baseret richtext-editor med indlejret medier, callouts, tabeller, kodeblokke og AI-funktioner.

item.title: Interaktive elementer
item.description: Datadrevet interaktivt indhold — diagrammer, beregnere, demoer med CMS-styret data.
